_revision: v4 — fixes responsive layout failure flagged by scene_inspector_verdict.json. Anchor math (feet on deck at bg y=85%) preserved verbatim from v3. Tool paths, palm anchor, mission text, rival overlay zone — all preserved verbatim from v3. ONLY the CSS structure changed: zone-b now hosts a 16:9 inscribed #scene-stage and a blurred #bg-backdrop fills any letterbox area.
_bg_chosen_reason: Cargo plane interior, 16:9 source. asset_catalog suggested_uses includes 'M1 setup phase'. Visual re-inspection of pipeline/asset_keyframes/bg_M1.jpg (1280x720) confirms: deck-line at y≈85%, opening at y=20-65% × x=37-63%. v4 keeps this bg unchanged but renders it inside a scene-stage container that is GUARANTEED to match the bg's 16:9 aspect — so object-fit:cover becomes a no-op (no zoom, no crop), and percentages on the scene-stage map 1:1 to bg pixel coordinates on EVERY viewport.

_responsive_layout_pattern._problem_solved: Previous v3 implementation placed bg inside zone-b (which is 100vw × 54vh, aspect varies with viewport). object-fit:cover stretched/cropped bg to fill zone-b — on 16:10 and wider laptops, bg's TOP got cropped (ceiling lost). Earlier object-fit:contain attempt produced visible BLACK BARS that Nirit rejected ('חצי מסך שחור'). Earlier object-position:50% 100% fix cropped bg's TOP (Nirit: 'כל הרקע חתוך למעלה').
_responsive_layout_pattern._industry_pattern: YouTube / Netflix / film websites all face the same problem and solve it with a TWO-LAYER inscribed-stage pattern: (1) a backdrop fill (blurred, dimmed, scaled-up copy of the same media) covers the full container; (2) the actual media is inscribed in its true aspect ratio, centered. The result: no hard black bars, no media cropping.

_geometry._proof_for_1920x1080_viewport: viewport 100vw=1920px, 54vh=583px. scene-stage width = min(1920, 583*16/9) = min(1920, 1037) = 1037px. scene-stage height = min(583, 1920*9/16) = min(583, 1080) = 583px. aspect 1037/583 = 1.778 ✓ (16:9). Letterbox bars: (1920-1037)/2 = 442px each side, filled by blurred backdrop.
_geometry._proof_for_1366x768_viewport: viewport 100vw=1366px, 54vh=415px. scene-stage width = min(1366, 415*16/9) = min(1366, 738) = 738px. scene-stage height = min(415, 1366*9/16) = min(415, 769) = 415px. aspect 738/415 = 1.778 ✓. Letterbox: (1366-738)/2 = 314px each side, blurred.
_geometry._proof_for_768x1024_viewport_tablet_port: viewport 100vw=768px, 54vh=553px. scene-stage width = min(768, 553*16/9) = min(768, 983) = 768px. scene-stage height = min(553, 768*9/16) = min(553, 432) = 432px. aspect 768/432 = 1.778 ✓. Pillarbox: (553-432)/2 = 60.5px top+bottom, blurred.
_geometry._proof_for_375x812_viewport_phone_portra: viewport 100vw=375px, 54vh=438px. scene-stage width = min(375, 438*16/9) = min(375, 778) = 375px. scene-stage height = min(438, 375*9/16) = min(438, 211) = 211px. aspect 375/211 = 1.777 ✓. Pillarbox top+bottom (438-211)/2 = 113.5px each, blurred.

_responsive_layout_pattern._actress_anchor_proof_v4: Inside scene-stage (which is 1:1 with bg pixel grid), bottom:12.8% places canvas-bottom at y=87.2% of scene-stage = 87.2% of bg. With pose feet_y_pct_in_canvas=96 and chosen height 55%: feet_y_on_bg = 87.2 - 0.04*55 = 87.2 - 2.2 = 85.0%. ✓ matches bg.ground_line_y_pct=85. head_y_on_bg = 87.2 - 0.92*55 = 36.6%. ✓ inside opening_zone (20-65%). MATHEMATICALLY IDENTICAL to v3, but now ROBUST across viewports because scene-stage = bg pixel grid 1:1.

bg._static_bg_reason: M1 setup phase background must be FROZEN. Visible loop seam in bg_M1.mp4 ruins immersion (Nirit feedback 2026-04-25). Builder MUST emit muted+playsinline+preload only — NO autoplay, NO loop — and seek+pause at static_frame_at_seconds in JS init.
bg.opening_zone_y_pct: 20-65 (the jagged tear/ramp through which jungle is visible)
bg._two_layer_render: Builder emits TWO <video> elements pointing at the same src. (1) #bg-backdrop is the blurred fill behind scene-stage. (2) #bg-phase-1 is the sharp inscribed bg inside scene-stage. Both seek+pause at 0.5s in initStaticBg().

scene_stage._role: 16:9 inscribed wrapper inside zone-b. ALL scene-anchored elements (bg-phase-1, player-wrapper, rivals-canvas, scenery overlays) live inside this wrapper. Percentages are of scene-stage, which IS the bg pixel grid.

bg_backdrop._role: Blurred, scaled, dimmed copy of bg fills any letterbox area in zone-b so user never sees hard black bars. Industry pattern (YouTube, Netflix).

actress._static_pose_reason: M1 setup phase = waiting for player decision. Actress is VISUALLY FROZEN on a single frame (pose_05 currentTime=0.5s, hands settled at sides). Builder MUST set track is_pose_hold=true with from_sec=to_sec=0.5 — NO loop_until_event for this phase.

_anchor_proof.verdict: feet land on cargo deck at bg y=85%. Head at bg y=36.6% inside opening, silhouettes against bright sky+jungle. ANCHORED CORRECTLY ON ALL VIEWPORTS because scene-stage is always 1:1 with bg.
_anchor_proof.v3_to_v4_diff: Anchor numbers IDENTICAL. Only the container changed: v3 percentages were of zone-b (which had variable aspect → broke at runtime). v4 percentages are of scene-stage (always 16:9 → correct at runtime).

actress.pose_visual_role: stands on cargo floor inside plane, framed by metal tear / open ramp behind her. Body silhouettes against bright sky+jungle visible through the opening. Head inside opening (y=36%), feet on deck (y=85%).

actress_catch_pose._pose_06_motion: actress raises her LEFT arm extending palm forward. By t=5.5s arm is fully extended.
actress_catch_pose._palm_anchor_reason: Tool ends up TOUCHING the raised palm. Pose_06 at currentTime 5.5s shows her left palm at canvas (11%, 22%). Preserved verbatim from v3 (Nirit-confirmed).

rivals_overlay._zone_check: Rivals confined to the SKY portion of the cargo-bay opening (y=22-36% on bg, x=38-62% on bg). Same as v3 — preserved.
rivals_overlay.render_mode: canvas — chroma keyed silhouettes drawn at 4 random positions
rivals_overlay.rival_size_pct: 25% width of container each, scattered, opacity 0.45

tools_zone_d._source_correction: tool source path = assets/tools_final/ (Nirit-confirmed v3, preserved).

mission_text.verbatim: דלת המטוס נפרצה והרוח שואבת הכל החוצה! המתחרים כבר באוויר וצוברים יתרון מטורף. אני חייבת לקפוץ עכשיו כדי לא לפספס את אזור הנחיתה – איך אני מזנקת מכאן?

_5_question_self_check.Q1_actress_on_surface: YES — bottom:12.8% + height:55% places feet at bg y=85% on EVERY viewport because scene-stage is always inscribed at the bg's true aspect (16:9). Verified via geometry proofs at 1920x1080, 1366x768, 768x1024, 375x812.
_5_question_self_check.Q2_what_behind_actress: פנים מטוס תובלה: לוחות מתקרה מתכת, מושבי קומנדו עם רצועות בצדדים, ובאמצע־אחור הפתח המרובע הקרוע שדרכו רואים שמיים בהירים, אופק כחלחל-הרים, ויער ג'ונגל ירוק.
_5_question_self_check.Q3_what_does_script_say: דלת המטוס נפרצה והרוח שואבת הכל החוצה! המתחרים כבר באוויר וצוברים יתרון מטורף. אני חייבת לקפוץ עכשיו כדי לא לפספס את אזור הנחיתה – איך אני מזנקת מכאן?
_5_question_self_check.Q4_match_script_to_visual: MATCH on every viewport — keywords ['מטוס','דלת/פתח','נפרצה','המתחרים באוויר','אזור הנחיתה'] all preserved. The full bg (ceiling+walls+opening+jungle+sky) is visible inside scene-stage on every viewport. The blurred backdrop fills letterbox area without distracting (blur(20px) + brightness(0.55)).
_5_question_self_check.Q5_will_a_7yo_understand: YES on every viewport. Subject: actress feet on deck, head in opening — anchored. Situation: cargo plane interior with torn opening to jungle/sky — fully visible. Choice: 3 tools at bottom.

_v3_to_v4_changelog: ONLY responsive layout fixed. NO change to: bg file, ground_line_y_pct, opening_zone, actress pose/static behavior, palm_anchor, rivals zone, tools (paths, labels, points), mission text, mission text CSS, soundEvents, soundAmbients, timing, palm_anchor scale_factor. ADDED: scene_stage block, bg_backdrop block, _responsive_layout_pattern documentation. CHANGED: actress.css and rivals_overlay.container_css now reference container='scene_stage' (semantic only — the percentages are unchanged).
